content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Nomad: Senior Software Engineer II Anywhere in the World 🇺🇲 United States Minor Outlying Islands and 🇺🇸 United States of America Colorado Full-Stack Programming Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5199/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Denver CO <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://nomadlease.com">https://nomadlease.com</a> </p> <p><strong>About Nomad</strong></p> <p>Nomad is unlocking economic opportunity for everyone in the long-term rental community. We offer property owners guaranteed rent and peace of mind, while delivering a better rental experience for residents. Backed by leading investors, we're transforming a massive, fragmented market with technology that makes renting better for everyone involved.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>About the Team</strong></p> <p>Nomad's Engineering team builds the platform that powers guaranteed rent, owner dashboards, resident experiences, and the operational tools that make our business run. We're a small, senior team that ships fast and owns our outcomes. You'll work alongside product, design, and ops to solve real problems in a massive, underserved market. We're entering a new phase of growth. This is a high-leverage moment to join.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>About the Role</strong></p> <p>We're hiring a Senior Software Engineer to take on meaningful ownership of our platform and deliver features that directly impact the business. You'll work across the stack, make real technical decisions, and ship end-to-end. This is a role for someone who's moved past needing close direction. You see what needs to be done, you build it well, and you make the people around you better in the process.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>In this role, you will:</strong></p> <ul> <li> <p>Build and ship features across our Rails backend and Typescript+React frontend</p> </li> <li> <p>Play a crucial role in bringing solid engineering principles into multiple legacy codebases</p> </li> <li> <p>Own your work end-to-end; from technical design through implementation, testing, and deployment</p> </li> <li> <p>Collaborate directly with product and design to refine requirements and deliver solutions that move business metrics</p> </li> <li> <p>Write clean, well-tested code and contribute to improving our engineering standards</p> </li> <li> <p>Participate in code reviews and provide constructive feedback that raises the quality bar</p> </li> <li> <p>Identify and address technical debt, bugs, and performance issues proactively</p> </li> <li> <p>Contribute to architectural discussions and help the team make sound technical decisions</p> </li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Who you are</strong></p> <ul> <li> <p>An experienced product engineer with strong systems thinking abilities; you should be comfortable asking questions and improving the ideas that shape product iteration as well as executing on product vision</p> </li> <li> <p>Significant professional software engineering experience, with strong experience in Typescript+React, Ruby+Rails, and RDBMS (we use Postgre)</p> </li> <li> <p>You have experience with modern testing philosophies and can actively improve test suites that are slow, nondeterministic, or need updated practices</p> </li> <li> <p>Bonus: You have experience automating workflows, using Playwright, Slack bots, and other tooling</p> </li> <li> <p>You've shipped meaningful features or systems and can point to work you owned and delivered</p> </li> <li> <p>Solid technical fundamentals; you write clean code, think about edge cases, and care about quality</p> </li> <li> <p>You introduce and discuss modern tooling and libraries that solve recurring problems in the codebase</p> </li> <li> <p>You are relentless in pushing for simplified patterns in the code and you have examples of systems you've simplified.</p> </li> <li> <p>You have built out tooling (CI/Editor) to enforce improved coding practices across a codebase and improve developer experience.</p> </li> <li> <p>You have experience with writing component and e2e-level visual browser tests and know when to use each.</p> </li> <li> <p>Comfortable working across the stack; you're not precious about frontend vs. backend</p> </li> <li> <p>Strong collaborator who communicates clearly with both technical and non-technical teammates</p> </li> <li> <p>Self-directed: You take initiative, manage your own work, and don't wait to be told what's next</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience in a startup or high-growth environment preferred</p> </li> <li> <p>You’re comfortable using AI coding tools when they speed up implementation, debugging, or test writing, but you don’t rely on them to replace engineering judgment.</p> </li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Interview process</strong></p> <ol> <li> <p>Quick meeting with recruiter to discuss role and company</p> </li> <li> <p>Hiring manager interview</p> </li> <li> <p>(up to) 3 hour technical assessment where you'll work on a real problem that a Nomad engineer would own, building a feature.</p> </li> <li> <p>Discuss technical assessment with engineering and product</p> </li> <li> <p>Founder interview</p> </li> </ol> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Where you'll be</strong></p> <p>Remote within the continental United States. Denver-based candidates are preferred and are encouraged to work hybrid from our downtown office.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>At Nomad, we are committed to offering competitive compensation that reflects the value each team member brings to our mission. Salary ranges for this role are determined based on factors such as experience, skills, location, and role expectations. Final offers may vary from the posted range, ensuring fair and equitable consideration for every candidate.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Our Values</strong></p> <p> Nomads Build Community: We foster genuine relationships and act as dependable stewards of our community.</p> <p> One Percent Better Every Day: We are always learning, taking small, deliberate actions to continuously improve.</p> <p> Mission Before Ourselves: We're a championship team driven to make our customers' lives better.</p> <p> Act From Ownership: We roll up our sleeves, solve problems proactively, and take responsibility for our work.</p> <p> Dream Without Boundaries: We challenge the status quo and strive to achieve the extraordinary.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Benefits at Nomad</strong></p> <p>We believe in supporting our team with benefits that enh
